goal: Restore only the already-started main battle screen UI to the user's previous version after arena entry and faction selection, without changing any other screen, flow, gameplay logic, or assets.
constraints: Do not modify lobby, story mode, character encyclopedia, card codex, community, pre-battle flow, topic selection flow, or faction selection screens unless strictly required by one of the allowed files.
Do not modify battleV2 gameplay logic, rules, card data, or timing behavior.
Only revert presentation-layer changes on the main in-battle screen and its immediate chrome.
Preserve any later non-visual functionality that is already working.
deliverables: The main battle screen after faction selection matches the user's earlier UI style again.
Only the battle-in-progress shell/chrome is restored; unrelated pages stay untouched.
Build or targeted verification passes after the restore.
